settings.title: 30-Day Returns
settings.description: Not happy? Return within 30 days for a full refund.

settings.title: 2-Year Warranty
settings.description: Full manufacturer warranty on every unit.

settings.question: Can I change my configuration after ordering?
settings.answer: Contact us within 24 hours of ordering and we can modify your configuration before dispatch.

settings.question: Are modules interchangeable between units?
settings.answer: Yes. All SOREIN battery and inverter modules are compatible with every A6 Base Unit.
